Our Services

🔓

Lockout Service

Fast, professional lockout assistance. We'll get you back in your car quickly.

$65
🛞

Tire Change

Professional tire change service right on the road. Get back on track fast.

$55
⛽

Fuel Delivery

Out of gas? We deliver fuel directly to you (includes 2 gallons).

$55
🔋

Jump Start

Dead battery? Our technicians will get you started in minutes.

$55

Why Choose Cascade Roadside?

⚡

30-Minute Response

We pride ourselves on fast response times. Help is never far away when you need it most.

👤

Real Humans Answer

No automated systems or long hold times. Speak directly with a real person who cares about your problem.

🏘️

Local & Trusted

We're based right here in Pierce County. We know our roads and your community.

💰

No Hidden Fees

Transparent pricing. You know exactly what you'll pay before we come out to help.
